channel.title: Projects on Jaap Meerhof
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Jaap Meerhof

item.title: Master Thesis
item.description: I’m currently busy with my assignment for the RIVM (National Dutch Institute for Health and Nature).

item.title: Personal Website
item.description: I always wanted to have my own website, however I did not want to deal with the front-end as JavaScript, CSS, and HTML coding is not something I enjoy as much as doing back-end work.

item.title: Blockchain Connector
item.description: For the project of our Blockchain course we were tasked in creating anything as long as it would use or interact with blockchains.

item.title: Bachelor Research
item.description: For my bachelor’s assignment I chose a project that involved Reinforcement Learning.

item.title: Bachelor Design
item.description: For my bachelor design project we were tasked in creating a location based augmented reality app.
